commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=541db39710908a4e6ba1218ffdde65fd1b298a38)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds replyToId, replyToBody, and replyToSender to canonical inbound hook mapping, before_dispatch hook payloads, related plugin hook types, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +91. Total +148 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live run here. Current main finalizes ReplyTo* fields, then the canonical hook mapper and before_dispatch payload omit them before plugin hooks run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the additive plugin hook API contract; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair to queue while proof is missing.

target.title: fix(hooks): expose inbound reply metadata before dispatch
target.body:
Fixes #88521.

## Summary

- carry inbound reply metadata through the canonical message hook context
- expose `replyToId`, `replyToBody`, and `replyToSender` to `before_dispatch` event and context payloads
- add coverage for the mapper and dispatch hook boundary

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Discord reply metadata was finalized into inbound context fields, but plugin `before_dispatch` hooks could not see the replied-to message id/body/sender and therefore could not implement reply-aware commands through the public hook API.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout at `/Users/andy/openclaw-88521`, branch `fix/discord-reply-hook-context-88521`, commit `541db39710`.

Exact steps or command run after the patch:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/hooks/message-hook-mappers.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts
git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD
```

Evidence after fix: The hook mapper and dispatch tests passed, and the outgoing commit author was verified:

```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  14 passed (14)
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  188 passed (188)
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 22.17s
541db39710 Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com> Expose reply metadata to before_dispatch hooks
```

Observed result after fix: A finalized inbound context with `ReplyToId`, `ReplyToBody`, and `ReplyToSender` now reaches the canonical hook context and the `before_dispatch` event/context as `replyToId`, `replyToBody`, and `replyToSender`.

What was not tested: I did not connect to live Discord; this is covered at the finalized inbound-context to plugin-hook dispatch boundary.
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
